texto: Americans have a special horror of letting things happen their own way without interference. They would like to jump down their stomachs digest the food and shovel the shit out.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a William Burroughs: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Americans have a special horror of letting things happen their own way without interference. They…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, america, americans pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de americans.
